title: The Download: South Korea’s hottest bachelors, and advancing eye transplants
summary: South Korea's semiconductor industry workers, including a 35-year-old SK Hynix manager named Baek, have become sought-after bachelors through matchmaking services, reflecting the prestige and desirability of tech professionals. The article also covers advancing eye transplant technology. It highlights how career status intersects with dating culture in high-tech societies.
content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. zh.title: 科技资讯：韩国最受欢迎的单身男性和眼球移植技术进展
zh.summary: 韩国半导体行业的工作者，包括一位名叫白某的35岁SK海力士经理，已通过婚介服务成为被追捧的单身男性，反映了科技专业人士的威望和吸引力。文章还涵盖了眼球移植技术的进展，强调了职业地位与高科技社会约会文化的交叉融合。

title: South Korea’s hottest new bachelors are chip workers
summary: South Korea's booming semiconductor industry is making chip workers highly desirable marriage prospects, with parents increasingly enrolling their sons from major companies like SK Hynix into matchmaking services. The trend reflects both the economic importance of the semiconductor sector and its appeal as a stable, well-compensated career path in South Korea's competitive marriage market.
content: Baek, a 35-year-old manager at the South Korean semiconductor titan SK Hynix, was enrolled in Sunoo, a matchmaking company based in Seoul, a year ago. zh.title: 韩国最热门的新单身汉是芯片工人
zh.summary: 韩国兴盛的半导体产业正使芯片工人成为极受欢迎的婚配对象，越来越多父母正在将来自SK海力士等大公司的儿子登记到相亲服务。这一趋势既反映了半导体行业的经济重要性，也反映了它在韩国竞争激烈的婚配市场中作为稳定、高薪职业的吸引力。
